chunks.title: Yahweh's Throne and the Humble
chunks.reason: Oracle contrasting God's transcendence with His preference for the humble over ritualistic worshipers.

chunks.title: Comfort to the Tremblers
chunks.reason: Speech addressing those who tremble at God's word regarding their enemies.

chunks.title: Zion's Restoration and Comfort
chunks.reason: Oracle describing the miraculous birth of Zion and the comfort promised to her children.

chunks.title: Judgment by Fire
chunks.reason: Oracle depicting Yahweh's fiery judgment on enemies and the fate of idolatrous worshippers.

chunks.title: Gathering of Nations and New Creation
chunks.reason: Vision of the final gathering of nations to Jerusalem and the eternal state of worship.
